title: Cache optimization mechanism
abstract: An apparatus includes a central processing unit (CPU), including a plurality of processing cores, each having a cache memory, a fabric interconnect coupled to the plurality of processing cores and cryptographic circuitry, coupled to the fabric interconnect including mesh stop station to receive memory data and determine a destination of the memory data and encryption circuitry to encrypt/decrypt the memory data based on a destination of the memory data.
claims: 1. An apparatus comprising a central processing unit (CPU), including: a plurality of processing cores, each having a cache memory; a fabric interconnect coupled to the plurality of processing cores; and cryptographic circuitry, coupled to the fabric interconnect, including: mesh stop station to receive memory data and determine a destination of the memory data; and encryption circuitry to perform an encryption operation on the memory data upon determining that a first destination is a cache memory and to transmit the memory data without performing the encryption operation upon determining that the first destination is not cache memory.
